title: Hermes 2.0 — Multi-Source 24/7 Lead Discovery + Intel Engine
vision: Pivot from LinkedIn-cobaia-outreach (FROZEN) to $0-first multi-source 24/7 lead discovery + enrichment + market intel. Top-of-funnel feeding Geronimo (execution) + Vuecra (site delivery). Migrates to Contabo VPS 30 cohabiting Bolseye + Geronimo. Shares Geronimo LLM 3-layer stack + agentmemory.

constraints.host: Contabo VPS 30 (8vCPU/24GB/200GB) cohabiting Bolseye + Geronimo on geronimo-net 172.28.0.0/16
constraints.linkedin: FROZEN behind FEATURE_LINKEDIN=off, zero deletion, Patchright VM-only

sources_build_order.name: self-hosted Overpass (OSM)
sources_build_order.impl: Docker wiktorn/overpass-api + Geofabrik brazil-latest.osm.pbf + minute diffs
sources_build_order.yields: name, coords, category; when tagged phone/website/hours/whatsapp/social

sources_build_order.name: Receita Federal CNPJ open data
sources_build_order.impl: quarterly CSV dumps -> Postgres hermes_cnpj, Cuiaba subset by municipio+CNAE
sources_build_order.yields: razao social, nome fantasia, CNAE, address, situacao, data abertura, socios
sources_build_order.legality: gov open data + LGPD on PII

sources_build_order.name: own-website scrape
sources_build_order.impl: curl_cffi T1 static; Patchright T2 if JS (VM-only); schema.org JSON-LD first
sources_build_order.yields: phone, email, wa.me, og social, aggregateRating

sources_deferred_avoid.name: Google Maps scraping
sources_deferred_avoid.reason: breaks $0 (paid proxies) + Google ToS + civil-suit risk resold leads

sources_deferred_avoid.name: Apple Maps Server API
sources_deferred_avoid.reason: free 25k/day but ToS caching/display limits, optional cross-check only

sources_deferred_avoid.name: Nominatim
sources_deferred_avoid.reason: geocoding gap-fill only, self-host if volume

geronimo.status: lead-ingest API does NOT exist yet - cross-project dependency
geronimo.flow: Envelope(source=hermes_qualified, type=lead.qualified) -> NATS geronimo.in.hermes.qualified_leads -> new hermes-leads-router consumer -> Kanban side=hermes OR HITL
geronimo.hermes_side: mcps/hermes-geronimo POST /handoff, handoff_jobs table, retries 3x exp-backoff

vuecra.status: contract documented in vuecra CROSS-PROJECT-ENV.md + PHASE-HI1/HI2
vuecra.schema_migration: migrations/006_vuecra_stages.py: add site_url, site_delivered_at, site_project_id, idempotency_key, hermes_source; stages site_ready/site_in_progress/site_delivered
vuecra.port_risk: vuecra assumes Hermes:8500, current config dashboard_port=55000 - pin canonical port in CROSS-PROJECT-ENV.md before HI2

shared.llm: nim-router-mcp HTTP tenant_id=hermes separate daily cap; categorize/ICP/dedup on local Ollama T3 $0

phases.name: Overpass Discovery Backbone
scope: Docker wiktorn/overpass-api + brazil .pbf + minute diffs mem_limit 8g
wire core/pipeline.py discovery stage (drop Google Places)

phases.name: CNPJ Authority + Enrich
scope: load RF dump Cuiaba subset 5103403+CNAE -> Postgres hermes_cnpj

phases.name: Contact-Enrich (website)
scope: scripts/scrape_website.py curl_cffi T1 / Patchright T2 VM-only

phases.name: Vuecra Handoff (HI1+HI2)
scope: GET /api/vuecra/queue + claim/delivered/failed + WS site.* with X-Internal-Token + idempotency

phases.name: Geronimo Handoff (NATS)
scope: coordinate Geronimo POST /api/v1/qualified_leads + NATS + hermes-leads-router consumer

phases.name: Market Intelligence
scope: brain/market_analyzer.py aggregate CNAE density + situacao churn + new-reg velocity -> market_signal events
Market-Intel dashboard page heat by category/region

phases.name: Hardening + Observability
scope: extend observability.py scraper/source health + per-source cost

owner_decisions: Full Brazil .pbf vs Mato-Grosso-only (decide at F1 by RAM headroom)
Approve golden-record KB schema before F2 dedup/merge
Handoff trigger thresholds: Geronimo (score>=60 + audit_done?), Vuecra site_ready (has_website=false OR score>=70?)
Geronimo lead-ingest API: coordinate or stub for F6

risks.mitigation: mem_limit 8g, conservative OVERPASS_RATE/TIME/SPACE, MG-only extract if tight

risks.risk: OSM contact-tag fill LOW ~40% in Cuiaba
risks.mitigation: website-scrape F3 + CNPJ F2 MANDATORY not optional
legitimate-interest B2B basis, opt-out, no sensitive storage, route via Geronimo constitution_gates, attribute OSM ODbL
pin canonical port in CROSS-PROJECT-ENV.md before HI2

risks.risk: Geronimo lead-ingest API not built yet
risks.mitigation: F6 cross-project dep, coordinate or stub hermes-leads-router
PageSpeed + schema.org aggregateRating cover review signal; Google needs paid proxies + ToS + civil risk
flag gate ALL entry points (daemon P0/P2, api/cobaia.py, api/lab.py, dashboard); flag-off smoke test F0
DEFER Overture/Foursquare/Apple + multi-vendor enrichment; Overpass+CNPJ+website sufficient for Cuiaba
